data.title: Create review-stats.py aggregation and reporting module
data.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/scripts/review-stats.py — Python module for reading JSONL events, compacting fragments, computing metrics, and formatting the summary table.

Functions:
- read_events(events_dir, since=None): Read all .jsonl files, parse each line, skip malformed with warning, apply time window filter
- compact_fragments(events_dir): Merge per-agent fragment files into date-partitioned YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl files. Use flock on .review-events/.review-compact.lock for safe compaction.
- compute_metrics(events): Calculate pass/fail rates by review_type, avg dimension scores, finding severity distribution, avg revision cycles, commit duration and failure rate
- format_table(metrics): Format metrics as aligned summary table for terminal output

CLI interface: argparse with --since=YYYY-MM-DD and --all flags. Default 30-day window. --events-dir arg for testability.

Malformed line tolerance: try/except json.JSONDecodeError per line, print warning to stderr, continue.

## TDD Requirement
GREEN — Task 1 RED tests pass.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/review-stats.py (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass. Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists. Verify: test -f plugins/dso/scripts/review-stats.py
- [ ] All 6 pytest tests pass. Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_review_stats.py -q
- [ ] Script handles --since flag. Verify: python3 plugins/dso/scripts/review-stats.py --help | grep -q "since"
